positive: A celestial bioluminescent flora composition, featuring highly stylized deep emerald and indigo glowing jungle leaves intertwined with delicate, glowing gold mycelium threads. The main subject is a central arrangement of abstract, oversized cosmic blooms that float against a dark nebula background. The style is Neo-Art Deco meets bioluminescent nature illustration, rendered with clean, graphic silhouettes and strong rim lighting. Composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for apparel placement. Use high contrast, deep saturated jewel tones, and a magical, dreamlike atmosphere. Vector illustration quality, ultra-detailed, high definition, 8k.
